name: Atrophy Bomb (Moderate)
description:
Activate 1 Strike

Atrophy bombs contain powerful chemicals developed by Urgathoan alchemists that sap a living creature's strength and drain their energy. The bomb deals 2d4 persistent void damage and 2 void splash damage, and the target is Enfeebled 1 until the start of your next turn. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls with this bomb.
